candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: In this figure, let circuit element X be a 2-ohm resistance. Find the power supplied by the 6-V source.

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The text clearly asks for the power supplied by the 6-V source, and the image provides the needed circuit topology and component labels (including 4Ω, 2Ω, 3Ω, X, and the 12-V source).
